### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>openshift/imagebuilder (github.com/openshift/imagebuilder)</summary>

### [`v1.2.16`](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/releases/tag/v1.2.16)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.15...v1.2.16)

#### What's Changed

-   Add a ParseIgnoreReader() by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/299](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/299)
-   Set empty `TARGETVARIANT` and `BUILDVARIANT` by [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/301](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/301)
-   Bump dependencies by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/302](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/302)
-   Add arm64 in Travis by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/303](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/303)
-   Inherit ARGs across stages that are based other stages by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/304](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/304)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​Honny1](https://redirect.github.com/Honny1) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/301](https://redirect.github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/pull/301)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/openshift/imagebuilder/compare/v1.2.15...v1.2.16

</details>
